claim_boundary: VexRiscv checkout, license, and generator-toolchain preflight only; no generated CPU RTL, selected-flow baseline, detector spend, formal, toggle, cold replay, PPA result, or optimization-win claim.

local_toolchain_probe.decision: Cannot generate VexRiscv.v in this container without provisioning a Java plus SBT or Mill generator toolchain.

checked_in_rtl_probe.decision: Do not run detectors or selected-flow synthesis until a pinned generated CPU RTL artifact is created or imported.

first_harness_work: Provision or import a pinned VexRiscv generator output, preferably GenFull or GenSmallest unless Aidan chooses another deterministic configuration.
Record the generator command, repo commit, generated RTL hash, and config class before detector replay.
Add a selected-flow baseline script only after generated CPU RTL is present.
Run source-only and selected-elaboration residual detector checks before any equivalence, toggle, or cold-replay spend.
risks: Generator dependency stack makes cold replay heavier than direct-Verilog cores.
A generated artifact without command and version pins would not be independently replayable.
Board-wrapper Verilog in the repository instantiates generated designs but does not replace the missing generated CPU RTL baseline.
